proposal.working_title: AI-Driven Marketing Campaigns: A 2026 Operator Playbook for Designing, Launching, and Optimizing in Days
proposal.one_line_angle: Existing AI marketing content tells operators what to buy; this is the actual playbook they run to design, launch, and optimize a multi-channel campaign in days, not weeks.
outline_bullets: The Five-Layer Stack Powering AI-Driven Marketing Campaigns in 2026 (and How Operators Pick the Layer-One Brain)
From Brief to Live in 72 Hours: The Operator Workflow for Designing and Launching an AI-Driven Campaign
Optimization Loop: How to Read Your Campaign Telemetry and Compound Conversion Lift Week-Over-Week
